---
title: "A study of ramp-metering in Perth"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# A Study of Ramp-Metering in Perth

| Name              | Student ID |
|-------------------|------------|
| Christian Fazzari | 22220880   |
| Annas Atif        | 22224125   |
| Madhan Jeelaga    | 22815626   |

: *Authors*
